title: Sanitize or Destroy System Media Containing CUI Before Disposal or Reuse
description: sanitize or destroy system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized or Destroyed Before Disposal
checks.purpose: Sanitization or destruction of system media containing CUI prior to disposal using NIST SP 800-88 compliant methods is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized Before Release for Reuse
checks.purpose: Sanitization of system media containing CUI prior to reuse including cryptographic erasure or secure overwrite is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized or Destroyed Before Disposal
checks.purpose: Sanitization or destruction of system media is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized Before Release for Reuse
checks.purpose: Sanitization of system media prior to reuse is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized or Destroyed Before Disposal
checks.purpose: Sanitization or destruction of system media is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized Before Release for Reuse
checks.purpose: Sanitization of system media prior to reuse is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized or Destroyed Before Disposal
checks.purpose: Sanitization or destruction of system media is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: System Media Containing CUI is Sanitized Before Release for Reuse
checks.purpose: Sanitization of system media prior to reuse is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Establish and document media sanitization procedures compliant with NIST SP 800-88 Guidelines for Media Sanitization. Use cryptographic erasure for encrypted media, secure overwrite tools for magnetic media, and physical destruction for media that cannot be reliably sanitized. Maintain sanitization and destruction records for all CUI media.
